title: Self Adhesive Hooks,12 PCS Heavy Duty Door Wall Adhesive Hooks for Kitchen, Bathroom, Office, Closet, Hanging Coat Cloth Towel Key Decorations
features: ★STYLISH AND PRACTICAL -- The unique Stylish, lightweight and transparent design makes it almost almost invisible, which is very suitable for any home and outdoor decoration.

★PREMIUM MATERIALS -- JelKen adhesive hooks made of strong Nickel-plated Steel and PVC structure with good quality and long service life. Waterproof, Oil-proof, Corrosion resistance and Wear resistance.
★EASY TO USE -- No nails and drills needed. Easy to paste and remove without surface damage, You can utilize wall hooks repeatedly after cleaning and dry.
★SUITABLE FOR VARIOUS SURFACES -- Widely used on most smooth surfaces including Tiles, Glass, Metal and Wood. Do not use on wallpapers, other delicate or weak surfaces.
description: Product Description JelKen Self Adhesive Hooks Meet your needs in the living room, bathroom, kitchen, bedroom or any other spaces. Specification: Material: PVC material + Nickel-plated Steel Backside: Self-adhesive Package Includes: Self Adhesive Hooks x 12/30 Key Features: Waterproof, Oil-proof, Corrosion & Wear resistance. Heavy Duty Self Adhesive Hook, Max load up to 9kg. No tools, no drilling, no screws. 180 degree rotation. Durable and Reusable. Widely Used Hooks Kitchen Wall Hooks Bathroom Adhesive Hooks Living Room Seamless Hooks Notice: It is recommended not to hang dangerous or valuable items on the hook. Do not use on paint walls and rough surfaces. Before installing the hook, please make sure the surface is clean, dry, free of dust and oil, and wipe it dry first. Wait at least 12 hours before hanging something to ensure the product is firm fixed. How to remove: Heat it with a hair dryer, and then slowly remove it from the side without leaving a trace.
